title: ai-env
description: Declarative desired-state configuration for a Claude Code AI development environment.

marketplaces.description: Plugin marketplaces and package registries to connect to.

name.description: Short alias used to reference this marketplace in plugins and skills.

url.description: Base URL of the marketplace or registry.

plugins.description: Plugins to install from connected marketplaces.

marketplace.description: Must match the name of a declared marketplace.

id.description: Plugin identifier as known to the marketplace.

scope.description: Scope at which the plugin is installed. 'project' (default) = project-level, visible to all users of the project; 'user' = current user only; 'local' = local machine only, not committed.

skills.description: Claude Code skills to install and activate.

source.description: Where to obtain the skill. github = git clone; plugin = provided by an installed plugin; local = already on disk.

repo.description: GitHub repository in owner/repo format. Required when source is 'github'.

installPath.description: Filesystem path where the skill will be installed. Defaults to .claude/skills/<name>.

plugin.description: Plugin name that provides this skill. Required when source is 'plugin'.

marketplace.description: Marketplace that hosts the parent plugin. Required when source is 'plugin'.

name.description: Server identifier. Used as the key in .mcp.json.

transport.description: How to launch the server. Prefer docker > npx > uvx when multiple options exist.

image.description: Docker image name and tag. Required when transport is 'docker'.

package.description: npm package name (npx) or PyPI package name (uvx). Required for those transports.

command.description: Executable to run. Required when transport is 'local'.

args.description: Additional arguments passed after the command or package name.

env.description: Environment variables. Values starting with $ are resolved from .env.

agents.description: Subagent files expected to exist in .claude/agents/.

path.description: Path to the agent .md file, relative to project root.
